# EazyStore

> Mobile-first SaaS to launch and manage your online store — 4-step onboarding, product listings, and admin moderation in one sleek platform.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page introducing EazyStore for Store Owners and Super Admins.
- [Create Your Account](/auth): Sign up with email, phone, or Google to start a new store.
- [Sign In](/login): Existing-user login via email, phone OTP, or Google.
